title: dryopteris deltoidea
intro: Dryopteris deltoidea, also known as Delta-leaf Wood Fern, is a species of fern native to the Eastern United States. This plant is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dryopteris deltoidea include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Dryopteris deltoidea can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its medicinal potential.
